reviews.comment:
Como todas las estaciones del Acá buen combustible buena atención, en esta sucursal particularmente cuando venís de la ruta y los vídrios sucios lo delatan deberían limpiarlos .

(Translated by Google)
Like all the Acá stations, good fuel, good service, but at this branch, particularly when you're coming from the highway and the dirty windows give it away, they should clean them.

reviews.comment:
Parece que me.borran las.publicaciones. ya van 4veces que público y no aparece... Son un desastre.
No son Full para nada!!
Mala atención.
Sin productos.
Cero limpieza!
Cierren mejor!
Que quede la playa sola y será un bien a la humanidad.

(Translated by Google)
It seems like they're deleting my posts. I've posted four times now and it doesn't appear... They're a disaster.
They're not full at all!!
Poor service.
No products.
Zero cleanliness!
Better close it down!
Leave the beach alone and it will be a benefit to humanity.
